Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Ancient Determination
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +22% (augmented)
Pack Size: +9% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +37% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +80% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Puncturing" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 16(15-20)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 11(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 29(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Suffix Modifier "of Fatigue" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 25(30-25)% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
{ Suffix Modifier "of Obstruction" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters take 27(26-30)% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Hits
{ Suffix Modifier "of Hexwarding" (Tier: 1) }
42(50-40)% less effect of Curses on Monsters
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
